description: Web3 MCP proxy for AI agents: DeFi swaps, bridges, market data, wallets, and gated writes.
name: io.github.Apegurus/web3agent

environmentVariables.description: Default EVM chain ID. Defaults to Base mainnet (8453).
environmentVariables.name: CHAIN_ID

environmentVariables.description: Require explicit confirmation before write operations execute. Defaults to true.
environmentVariables.name: CONFIRM_WRITES

environmentVariables.description: Optional Etherscan API key for Etherscan-backed explorer tools.
environmentVariables.name: ETHERSCAN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional 0x API key for 0x swap plugin support.
environmentVariables.name: ZEROX_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional CoinGecko API key for higher-rate market data.
environmentVariables.name: COINGECKO_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional local path to a CCXT account config JSON file.
environmentVariables.name: CCXT_CONFIG_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional Open Wallet Standard vault passphrase for persisted local wallets.
environmentVariables.name: OWS_PASSPHRASE

title: web3agent
